---
title: "data_cleaning"
author: "Amit Haim"
date: '2024-04-25'
output: html_document
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

path = "C:/Users/USER/Documents/empirical_evidence_corren"

# Set the working directory for the whole document
# knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = path)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = here::here(path))
```

```{r include=FALSE}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(broom)
library(ggpubr)
library(tidyr)
library(gtable)
library(grid) # for unit.pmax()
library(gridExtra)
library(lubridate)
library(stargazer)
library(vtable)
library(stringr)
library(lmtest)
library(sandwich)
library(purrr)
library("readxl")
library(here)
library(haven)

```

```{r include=FALSE}
speech_file <- paste(here(),"replication files", "Replication_HearingText", "Data_speech.Rdata",sep = '/')

load(speech_file)

df_speech <- speech

hearings_file <- paste(here(),"replication files", "APSR_replication_files", "hearings_apsr.dta",sep = '/')

hearings_data <- read_dta(hearings_file)
hearings_data <- hearings_data %>%
  filter(congress >= 105) %>%
  filter(congress <= 114)


head(hearings_data)

head(df_speech)
```




```{r include=FALSE}
# Normalize case and trim whitespace
df_speech <- df_speech %>%
  mutate(title = tolower(trimws(title)))

hearings_data <- hearings_data %>%
  mutate(title = tolower(trimws(title)))


# Step 1: Extract the first few words (e.g., first 2 words) and convert to lowercase
extract_first_words <- function(title, num_words) {
  title %>%
    str_to_lower() %>%    # Convert to lowercase
    str_trim() %>%        # Trim whitespace
    { ifelse(str_count(., "\\S+") < num_words, ., word(., 1, num_words)) } # Extract words safely
}

df_speech <- df_speech %>%
  mutate(first_words = extract_first_words(title, 6))  # Extract first 2 words

hearings_data <- hearings_data %>%
  mutate(first_words = extract_first_words(title, 6))  # Extract first 2 words

# Step 2: Create a combined key for matching
df_speech <- df_speech %>%
  mutate(match_key = paste(first_words, congress, committee_code2, sep = "_"))

hearings_data <- hearings_data %>%
  mutate(match_key = paste(first_words, congress, cmt_thomas_id, sep = "_"))

# Step 3: Perform the join using the combined key
result_df <- df_speech %>%
  left_join(hearings_data, by = "match_key", suffix = c("_speech", "_hearings"))

# View the result

result_df <- result_df %>%
  distinct(speech, .keep_all = TRUE)


# add metadata of constitutional classification
df_freq_con <- read.csv(paste(path,"data", "df_freq_con.csv",sep = '/'))


result_df$hearing <- sub("\\.txt$", "", result_df$file_name)

result_df <- result_df %>%
  left_join(df_freq_con, by = "hearing")


write.csv(result_df, paste(path,"data", "merged_metadata_df.csv",sep = '/'), row.names = FALSE)

```




## add hearing type variable
```{r include=FALSE}

PAP_df <- read.csv(paste(path,"data", "US-Legislative_congressional_hearings-21.7.csv",sep = '/'))

PAP_df <- PAP_df %>%
  filter(Congress >= 105) %>%
  filter(Congress <= 114)

oversight_words <- c("oversight","review","report","budget request","control","impact","information","investigation","request","explanation","president","administration","contract","consultation","examination")


# Create a regex pattern to search for the oversight words
pattern <- paste(oversight_words, collapse = "|")  # Join words with OR operator "|"

# Create the 'type' variable
PAP_df$type <- ifelse(grepl(pattern, PAP_df$description, ignore.case = TRUE), "oversight", "legislative")

PAP_df <- PAP_df %>%
  mutate(title = tolower(trimws(title)))


# Step 1: Extract the first few words (e.g., first 2 words) and convert to lowercase
extract_first_words <- function(title, num_words) {
  title %>%
    str_to_lower() %>%    # Convert to lowercase
    str_trim() %>%        # Trim whitespace
    { ifelse(str_count(., "\\S+") < num_words, ., word(., 1, num_words)) } # Extract words safely
}

PAP_df <- PAP_df %>%
  mutate(first_words = extract_first_words(title, 3))  # Extract first 6 words

PAP_df <- PAP_df %>%
  mutate(match_key = paste(Congress,first_words, sep = "_"))


PAP_df <- PAP_df %>%
  select(match_key,description,type)


merged_metadata_df <- read.csv(paste(path,"data", "merged_metadata_df.csv",sep = '/'))


merged_metadata_df <- merged_metadata_df %>%
  mutate(first_words = extract_first_words(title_hearings, 3))  # Extract first 6 words


merged_metadata_df <- merged_metadata_df %>%
  mutate(match_key = paste(congress_hearings,first_words, sep = "_"))


#Perform the join using the combined key
merged_metadata_df <- merged_metadata_df %>%
  left_join(PAP_df, by = "match_key", suffix = c("_PAP", "_metadata"))


write.csv(result_df, paste(path,"data", "merged_metadata_df.csv",sep = '/'), row.names = FALSE)

```

# merge predicted df with metadata
```{r include=FALSE}
merged_metadata_df <- read.csv(paste(path,"data", "merged_metadata_df.csv",sep = '/'))

library(reticulate)
use_python("C:/Users/mitha/anaconda3/python.exe", required = TRUE)


# Use reticulate to import Python libraries
pickle <- import("pickle")

pkl_file <- paste(path,"data", "merged_hearings_roberta_predict.pkl",sep = "/")

df <- pickle$load(import("builtins")$open(pkl_file, "rb"))


df$hearing <- sub("\\.txt$", "", df$file_name)


# calculate empirical score
aggregated <- df %>%
  group_by(speech) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_score = mean(predictions, na.rm = TRUE),
    variance_score = var(predictions, na.rm = TRUE)
#    .groups = "drop"  # Avoid grouped DataFrame
  )


aggregated <- aggregated %>%
  left_join(merged_metadata_df,by="speech")

df <-aggregated

```



```{r include=FALSE}
df <- df %>%
  group_by(hearing) %>%
  mutate(across(
    starts_with("average_freq_ver"),
    ~ as.integer(mean(. > 0, na.rm = TRUE) > 0),
    .names = "class_const_{col}"
  )) %>%
  rename_with(~ gsub("average_freq_ver", "class_const_", .), starts_with("class_const")) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  rename_with(
    ~ gsub("class_const_class_const_", "class_const_", .), 
    starts_with("class_const_class_const_")
  )

df <- df %>%
    mutate(
    cmt_govtrack = gsub("HOUSE COMMITTEE ON ", "", cmt_govtrack, fixed = TRUE),
    cmt_govtrack = tools::toTitleCase(tolower(cmt_govtrack))
  ) %>% 
  mutate(type_legislative = case_when(
    type == "legislative" ~ 1,
    type == "oversight" ~ 0,
    TRUE ~ NA_real_
  ))



df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    majority_party = case_when(
      year_hearings >= 1996 & year_hearings <= 2006 ~ "R",
      year_hearings >= 2007 & year_hearings <= 2010 ~ "D",
      year_hearings >= 2011 & year_hearings <= 2016 ~ "R",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_  # Handle years outside this range
    )
  )



# save the working df as Rdata
save(df, file=paste(path,"data", "df_withempirical.RData",sep = '/'))
```




```{r include=FALSE}
library(httr)
library(purrr)
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)
library(readr)
library(stringr)

api_key <- "u9B8x7eCnRqZMd2pm0pfUSw7LDATCpveLDIzTJdN"






`%||%` <- function(x, y) if (is.null(x)) y else x

as_row <- function(x) {
  tibble(
    packageId    = pluck(x, "packageId", .default = NA_character_),
    title        = pluck(x, "title", .default = NA_character_),
    congress     = suppressWarnings(as.integer(pluck(x, "congress", .default = NA_character_))),
    dateIssued   = pluck(x, "dateIssued", .default = NA_character_),
    chamber      = pluck(x, "chamber", .default = NA_character_),
    docClass     = pluck(x, "docClass", .default = NA_character_),
    lastModified = pluck(x, "lastModified", .default = NA_character_)
  )
}

# Exponential backoff + jitter; retries 429 and 5xx
get_page <- function(url, query, max_tries = 12) {
  for (i in seq_len(max_tries)) {
    resp <- GET(url, query = query)
    sc <- status_code(resp)

    if (sc == 200) {
      return(content(resp, as = "parsed", type = "application/json"))
    }

    if (sc == 429 || (sc >= 500 && sc < 600)) {
      # exponential backoff with jitter
      base_wait <- min(300, 2^(i - 1))     # cap at 5 minutes
      jitter <- runif(1, 0, 1)
      wait <- base_wait + jitter

      message("HTTP ", sc, " (try ", i, "/", max_tries, "). Sleeping ", round(wait, 1), "s then retrying...")
      Sys.sleep(wait)
      next
    }

    # non-retryable
    stop_for_status(resp)
  }

  stop("Failed after ", max_tries, " tries. Last status: ", sc)
}

# Fetch ALL pages for a (congress, year) slice.
fetch_slice <- function(cong, year,
                        page_size = 1000,
                        throttle_seconds = 0.8) {

  url <- sprintf("https://api.govinfo.gov/published/%d-01-01/%d-12-31", year, year)

  offset <- "*"
  out <- list()
  page <- 1

  repeat {
    message("Congress ", cong, " | Year ", year, " | page ", page, " | offsetMark=", offset)

    query <- list(
      offsetMark = offset,
      pageSize   = page_size,
      collection = "CHRG",
      docClass   = "HHRG",
      congress   = as.character(cong),
      api_key    = api_key
    )

    dat <- get_page(url, query)

    pkgs <- dat$packages %||% list()
    out <- c(out, pkgs)

    next_off <- dat$nextPage %||% ""
    if (!nzchar(next_off)) break

    offset <- next_off
    page <- page + 1

    Sys.sleep(throttle_seconds)
  }

  map_dfr(out, as_row) %>%
    mutate(slice_year = year) %>%
    distinct(packageId, .keep_all = TRUE)
}

# ---- Driver: loop congresses and years, checkpoint each successful slice ----

out_dir <- "govinfo_house_hearings_slices"
dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)

congress_years <- tibble(
  congress = 105:114,
  start_year = c(1997,1999,2001,2003,2005,2007,2009,2011,2013,2015),
  end_year   = c(1998,2000,2002,2004,2006,2008,2010,2012,2014,2016)
) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(year = list(seq(start_year, end_year))) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  tidyr::unnest(year) %>%
  select(congress, year)

failed <- list()

for (i in seq_len(nrow(congress_years))) {
  cong <- congress_years$congress[i]
  yr   <- congress_years$year[i]

  outfile <- file.path(out_dir, sprintf("HHRG_cong%03d_%d.csv", cong, yr))

  # Skip if already downloaded (resume-friendly)
  if (file.exists(outfile)) next

  res <- tryCatch(
    {
      df_slice <- fetch_slice(cong, yr)

      # Always write, even if 0 rows (so we know it completed)
      write_csv(df_slice, outfile)
      message("Saved: ", outfile, " (rows=", nrow(df_slice), ")")
      TRUE
    },
    error = function(e) {
      message("FAILED slice cong=", cong, " year=", yr, " : ", conditionMessage(e))
      failed[[length(failed) + 1]] <<- tibble(congress = cong, year = yr, error = conditionMessage(e))
      FALSE
    }
  )
}

failed_tbl <- bind_rows(failed)
failed_tbl
# write_csv(failed_tbl, file.path(out_dir, "failed_slices.csv"))

# ---- Combine all completed slices; dedup by packageId globally ----

files <- list.files(out_dir, pattern = "^HHRG_cong\\d+_\\d{4}\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE)

hearings_all <- files %>%
  set_names() %>%
  map_dfr(read_csv, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  distinct(packageId, .keep_all = TRUE)

# ---- No duplicates guarantee ----
stopifnot(anyDuplicated(hearings_all$packageId) == 0)

hearings_all



  ```
